name: B&v
description_short: B&V Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union established in 1954, serving employees of Black & Veatch and their families with competitive loan rates and personalized financial services.
description_long:
B&V Credit Union was founded on June 15, 1954, by Black & Veatch employees seeking to provide convenient and high-quality financial services to fellow employees and their families. The credit union operates as a separate entity from Black & Veatch Corporation, though Black & Veatch serves as a valued sponsor with no financial interest. Over seven decades, the institution has maintained its founding principle of "service and convenience" while growing from 66 initial members with $2,051 in shares.

The credit union offers a range of consumer lending products including auto loans (new and used vehicles), signature loans, share accounts, and share certificates. Featured rates include new auto loans at 5.25-7.00% APR, used auto loans at 6.79-7.19% APR, and signature loans at 13.00% APR. Members can access services through a physical office in Overland Park, Kansas, a virtual branch, online banking tools, rate calculators, and payment services including their Bacon Pay system. The institution maintains a routing number (301080583) for direct deposits and transfers.

What distinguishes B&V Credit Union is its exclusive membership structure tied to Black & Veatch employment eligibility, combined with its member-owned governance model where each member holds equal voting power regardless of account balance. The organization operates on not-for-profit principles, returning profits to members through competitive rates rather than shareholder dividends. Board positions and the Supervisory Committee are volunteer roles filled by elected members, and the credit union operates under Kansas state supervision with NCUA insurance backing.

B&V Credit Union is best suited for current and former Black & Veatch employees and their extended family members (spouse, partner, children, parents, grandparents, siblings) seeking personalized service and member-focused rates. The $5.00 minimum deposit requirement to open an account is exceptionally low. However, the membership restriction is the primary limitation—those without Black & Veatch employment connections cannot join, making this institution inaccessible to the general public.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates (5.25-7.00% for new vehicles) with transparent APR ranges
Member-owned structure ensures democratic governance with equal voting power regardless of account balance
Not-for-profit model returns earnings to members through favorable rates rather than shareholder profits
Low minimum deposit requirement ($5.00) to open an account
Established 70-year track record since 1954 with consistent service focus
Multiple access channels including virtual branch, in-person office, phone, email, and online services
NCUA insurance protection and Kansas state regulatory oversight
cons: Membership restricted to Black & Veatch employees and their family members—not open to general public
Signature loan rates (13.00% APR) are notably higher than auto loan rates, limiting flexibility for other borrowing needs
Single physical office location in Overland Park, Kansas limits accessibility for geographically dispersed members
Limited information provided on website regarding savings account rates, CD rates, or full product suite
No mention of credit card products or other modern financial services typical of larger credit unions
best_for: Current employees of Black & Veatch Holding Company or Black & Veatch Corporation
Family members (spouses, children, parents, siblings) of eligible Black & Veatch employees
Individuals seeking member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution with democratic governance
Borrowers shopping for competitive auto loans with straightforward rate structures
diagnosis: B&V Credit Union is ideal for Black & Veatch employees and their eligible family members seeking competitive auto financing and personalized member-owned banking with democratic governance. The primary limitation is membership exclusivity—those without Black & Veatch employment connections are ineligible to join, making this institution unavailable to the general public despite its strong financial fundamentals.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: B&v — Credit Union in OVERLAND PARK, KS | CreditDoc
meta_description: B&v — NCUA-insured credit union in OVERLAND PARK, KS. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
